summary: TWO_COLUMN: kernel trick φ(x, y)=(x², y², √2 xy). LEFT 2D plane with 40 BLUE inner ring (r<0.8) + 40 RED outer ring (r>1.5). ValueTracker s_tr morphs dots via always_redraw to axonometric 3D φ-space. YELLOW separating plane z=1.25 fades in for s>0.5. Live morph parameter + class descriptions.
